title: tetracera alnifolia subsp. alnifolia
intro: Tetracera alnifolia subsp. alnifolia, also known as the Tetracera plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tetracera alnifolia subsp. alnifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Tetracera alnifolia subsp. alnifolia can be prepared for consumption in the form of herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its extracts are also used in various traditional remedies.
